title: The Rag Company - The Ultra Air Blaster (Version 2) – Lift and Blast Dirt and Debris Away for Interior Detailing; Durable and Ergonomic Metal Design; Trigger Operated
features: NEW and improved ULTRA Air Blaster V2 features easily replaceable press-fit bearings (replacement 2-pack sold separately on Amazon) and an updated cone design to reduce dirt build-up.
POWERFUL AIR CLEANING TOOL for all automotive surfaces including carpets, leather, plastic, air vents, engine bays, and much more. Also effective on wheels, vinyl tops, and hard-to-reach areas.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Manufactured with higher quality professional components and Anodized Finish that outlasts the competition.
SPECS & EXTRAS - Air Powered 4cfm at 90psi. INCLUDES: Standard and bristle trumpets; 1/4" NPT fitting. PRO TIP: 20-gallon air compressor recommended for max performance.
AMERICA’S PREMIER CAR DETAIL PRODUCTS - Since 1999, The Rag Company has been committed to making the highest quality microfiber and car detailing products available. Always the better value!
description: The ULTRA Air Blaster from the Rag Company is the only air tool you will ever need. Compressed air is forced out at 4 cfm in a swirling vortex that lifts and blasts away dirt, sand, and debris caught in your car's interior carpets, upholstery, and plastics. It is also effective at cleaning engine bays of dirt, leaves, and loose debris prior to detailing. A common application is to use the ULTRA Air blaster to blow out buffing pads to remove sealants, coating, paint, dust, and more to improve their service life. Durable aluminum body and ergonomic design. It includes a 1/4-inch NPT fitting that can attach to any adapter for use in any air compressor system. Also includes a standard trumpet and bristle trumpet for scrubbing and lifting debris out of carpets and vets before blasting it away with air. Removable swivel bearing for cleaning and replacement. Replacement bearings sold separately. An ideal car blower for drying. Experience a premium turbo dryer blower for car detailing.
